expectations.text: Housing is identified as the largest expense category ($2,200)
Spending is broken down by account (Chase Checking vs Amex Gold)
expectations.evidence: Account Breakdown table with Chase Checking $3,086.60 and Amex Gold $251.45

expectations.text: At least one transaction is flagged as notable or unusual
expectations.evidence: Rent Payment ($2,200.00) flagged as outlier, Whole Foods ($132.45) also flagged

expectations.text: Categories are ranked or sorted by total spend amount
expectations.evidence: 9 categories listed in descending order with percentages

expectations.text: Missing values or data quality issues are mentioned (even if none found)
expectations.evidence: Data Quality section: 'No missing values in any column, No duplicates detected'
